expectations.text: Organizes output into the 5 canonical buckets (pain points, trigger moments, objections, transformations, standout language)
expectations.evidence: Labeled BUCKET 1 PAIN POINTS, BUCKET 2 TRIGGER MOMENTS, BUCKET 3 OBJECTIONS, BUCKET 4 TRANSFORMATIONS, BUCKET 5 STANDOUT LANGUAGE

expectations.text: References scoring reviews 1-5 for quality before analysis
expectations.evidence: Review quality scoring section assigns 1-5 score to each of 8 reviews before analysis

expectations.text: Surfaces actual quotes from reviews (not just summary)
expectations.evidence: Bucket 5 contains 12 exact pulled quotes including 'grounding without being overpowering' and 'chaos zone'
Each of 8 reviews scored 1-5 with explicit label e.g. 'Review 2: 1 (garbage)', 'Review 7: 5 (gold)'

expectations.text: Discards or deprioritizes the 1-2 scored reviews (e.g. 'Love it', 'Smells great', 'Nice scent')
expectations.evidence: Explicitly 'Discarded: Reviews 2, 4, 6' corresponding to 'Smells great', 'Love it', and shipping filler

expectations.text: Highlights the breakup review and kitchen/chaos review as high-signal
expectations.evidence: Both scored 5 gold, breakup featured in Trigger Moments 'Gifted during a life rupture', kitchen in Transformations
